description_long: This lounge arrangement features a modern, urban seating area composed of a central gray upholstered sofa, two matching armchairs, and a low wooden coffee table. Flanking the seating are two tall, open-shelved black bookcases, providing both storage and visual framing. Decorative greenery is placed behind the sofa, adding a touch of nature and softening the overall look. The setup is placed against a textured, neutral-toned wall and rests on a dark, flat platform, suggesting an indoor or semi-outdoor urban environment. The furniture pieces are clean-lined and contemporary, with the sofa and chairs offering plush, inviting cushions. The overall composition is balanced and designed for comfort, conversation, and relaxation in a public or semi-public urban space.
description: A modern lounge set with a gray sofa, two armchairs, a wooden coffee table, and two tall black bookcases, accented by greenery and set against a neutral wall.
description_view_0: Side view showing the depth of the sofa, armchairs, and the arrangement of the coffee table and bookcases, with greenery visible behind the seating.
description_view_1: Frontal view highlighting the symmetrical arrangement of the sofa, armchairs, coffee table, and bookcases, with the greenery centered behind the sofa.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, showing the back of the sofa and the placement of the coffee table and bookcases.
description_view_3: Top-down view displaying the overall layout, with the seating area, table, and bookcases clearly arranged on the platform.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: One long seat cushion and three back cushions on the sofa, each armchair with a single seat and back cushion; all cushions appear loose and plush.
attribute_backrest_design: Straight, medium-height backrests with a simple, unsegmented design and no visible tufting or curvature.
attribute_armrest_presence: Present; armrests are straight, padded, and at a medium height, matching the sofa and armchairs' modern style.
attribute_leg_style: Short, blocky legs, likely wood or metal, with a straight orientation and minimal decorative features.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid gray upholstery with a smooth, matte texture and no visible pattern or tufting.
